imagePrompt: A bold, modern typographic design with the phrase 'Life is a series of meetings that could've been emails' in clean sans-serif font. The text is arranged in a stacked format with sharp alignment, accented by small minimalist icons of a coffee cup, a clock, and a computer window. Dual-mode palette: dark outline (charcoal or deep navy) around mid-tone fills (teal, burnt orange, sage green, dusty pink) with bright accent details (neon yellow, magenta). Transparent background, crisp bold linework, no photorealism.
printReadyPrompt: Typography: stacked sans-serif text, bold clean lines, stroke weights ~2px for dark outlines. Accents include small minimalist icons (coffee mug, clock, computer window). Palette: mid-tones of teal, burnt orange, dusty pink, and sage green with neon yellow/magenta highlights. Dual-mode to work on light and dark backgrounds.
